name: @types/ws
usage_summary: ws is imported in 5 source files in the app package: WebSocket and WebSocketServer from 'ws' in websocket.ts, websocket.test.ts, http-reverse-proxy.test.ts, and handlers.ts/handlers.test.ts. ws@8.18.0 does not ship its own .d.ts files (confirmed via pnpm store), so @types/ws provides the necessary type declarations.
how_to_remove: Not a removal candidate while ws is in use. If ws is replaced with a WebSockets package that bundles types (e.g. uWebSockets.js, or the native WebSocket available in Node.js >= 22), @types/ws can be removed from app devDependencies.
replacement_reason: ws is actively used for WebSocket server functionality in the app package's extension dev server and does not bundle its own types.
